name: Drifter Response Battleship
triggerNotes:
One Drifter Battleship will spawn if you damage the Decloaked Transmission Relay that appears at the end of a combat sites in C5/C6 Wormholes
A capital ship must be present in sites prior to the second wave spawning AND remain in site until the drifter has been spawned.
Note: The Drifter does not actually orbit at 40k. The orbit is about 10km - 12km. The drifters have 3 warp stability and at 20% armor will make a single attempt to warp off if not tackled.

name: Upgraded Avenger
triggerNotes:
Upgraded Avengers will spawn for the first capital ship (Dreadnoughts, Carriers,  Force Auxiliaries, & Lancers) that warp to combat/data or relic sites in C5/C6 Wormholes
Any escalation waves will despawn if capital ships leave the site, or strays further than 100KM of a site’s warp-in point.
